description: Capabilities for the main MARVIN desktop window. Intentionally narrow — the embedded MARVIN web app on localhost:3030 does the work. The native side only exposes a TCP probe, shell.open for external-link handling, window.start_dragging so `data-tauri-drag-region` on the app header can move the window, and the `node` sidecar spawn path used by ADR-0011's standalone bundle.
